query:
SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(sourceUrl) > 30 AND sourceUrl LIKE '%/%/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_article_path,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceUrl LIKE 'https://techcrunch.com' OR sourceUrl LIKE 'https://www.zdnet.com' OR sourceUrl LIKE 'https://venturebeat.com' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as homepage_only
FROM news_items
GROUP BY section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(sourceUrl) > 30 AND sourceUrl LIKE '%/%/%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_article_path,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sourceUrl LIKE 'https://techcrunch.com' OR sourceUrl LIKE 'https://www.zdnet.com' OR sourceUrl LIKE 'https://venturebeat.com' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as homepage_only
FROM news_items
GROUP BY section;
